companion.actor_system.no_persona: (no persona notes yet — improvise consistently with your name, sheet, and knowledge)
companion.actor_system.no_playstyle: (no particular playstyle noted — play to your sheet's strengths)
companion.actor_user.no_situation: It is your turn. What do you do?
companion.tools.add.done: ✅ Added AI companion "{name}" (id: {id}, {system}) to the party.
companion.tools.act.nested: ⚠️ A companion turn cannot trigger another companion to act.
companion.tools.act.failed: ❌ Failed to have the companion act: {error}
companion.tools.auto.on: ✅ Auto companion combat turns are ON (each companion acts on its initiative).
companion.tools.auto.off: ✅ Auto companion combat turns are OFF.
companion.tools.auto.failed: ❌ Failed to toggle auto companion turns: {error}
companion.tools.list.empty: 📄 No AI companions in the party yet. Use add_companion or .party add.
companion.tools.remove.done: ✅ Removed AI companion "{name}" from the party.
companion.tools.learns.failed: ❌ Failed to record what the companion learned: {error}
companion.director.final_turn_note: (This is the final companion turn of the round — make it count.)
companion.commands.party.help: Manage the AI companion party: .party add <name>, .party act <name>, .party auto on|off, .party (list)
companion.commands.party.usage: Usage: .party [add <name> [| persona] | act <name> [hint] | auto on|off | remove <name>] — or bare .party to list.
companion.commands.party.no_hub: ❌ Companion turns need a live session; open or join a room first.
companion.commands.party.act_none: ❌ No AI companion "{name}" is ready to act.
